---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the research pipeline, analysis, or infrastructure
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g., "It's cumbersome to [...]" or "The current analysis doesn't cover [...]"

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact
Describe the expected impact of this feature:
- [ ] New analysis capability
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Reproducibility enhancement
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI improvement
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or examples of similar features in other projects.

## Would You Be Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea
